title: Kael Character Sheet
sourceTitle: Full Character Sheet Kael 21 Year Old

imagePrompts.prompt: Full character sheet for KAEL, a 21-year-old Formula 1 rookie driver. Clean concept art layout on white background. Includes: front view, side view, back view turnaround in full body. Expression sheet with 4 close-up face poses — neutral, focused, cold stare, visor down. Signature pose: seated in cockpit, one gloved fist resting on wheel. Wearing a bold red racing suit with white and electric blue accents, clean sponsor stripe detailing. Helmet: glossy white with a vivid red and blue graphic stripe across the visor. Sharp angular jaw, dark undercut hair, bright amber eyes, lean athletic build. Annotation labels pointing to suit details, helmet design, arm patches, and boot grip. Bottom strip shows color palette swatches: vivid red, clean white, electric blue, bright yellow accent. Style: high-quality concept art, anime-influenced illustration, fine linework, flat white background, bright cinematic color grading, professional game/film character sheet layout.
